mapper.select:
SELECT noti_cont.notification_content_id, noti_cont.notification_id, noti_cont.content, noti_cont.locale, noti_cont.created_date, noti_cont.created_by FROM notification noti INNER JOIN notification_content noti_cont ON noti.notification_id = noti_cont.notification_id WHERE 1=1
AND noti_cont.locale = #{locale}
